texto: We cannot escape most of the crises in our lives, nor should we. In fact, these events frequently provide the energy for movement on our spiritual journey, even when we are stuck along the way... we ask questions about our own life. We wonder about meaning. Our present view may become inadequate. We ask deeper questions. Even joyful experiences can propel us forward.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Janet O. Hagberg sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. A afirmação “We cannot escape most of the crises in our lives, nor should we. In fact, these events frequently…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a reflexao, grief, spiritual-direction, útil em momentos de luto e viagem.
